metadata.name: drone-yolo-client
metadata.summary: Drone YOLO client for object detection and server communication.

variables.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.angle
documentation: in degrees

documentation: in degrees

variables.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.height
documentation: in meters

variables.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.image_size
documentation: Example image size

variables.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.pixel_to_meter_ratio
documentation: Example ratio: 1 pixel = 0.01 meters

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.calculate_principle_point
documentation: Calculate the principle point using the formula: Height * sec(angle)

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.calculate_distance
documentation: Calculate the distance d using the formula: d^2 = (Principle Point)^2 - Height^2

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.convert_bearing_to_radians
documentation: Convert the bearing angle from degrees to radians

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.calculate_coordinate_changes
documentation: Calculate the change in coordinates (Δx, Δy) using: Δx = d * cos(radian), Δy = d * sin(radian)

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.calculate_new_coordinates
documentation: Calculate the new coordinates (latitude, longitude) by adding changes to the start coordinates

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.calculate_image_center
documentation: Calculate the center point (xc, yc) of an image with given width and height

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.calculate_euclidean_distance
documentation: Calculate the Euclidean distance between two points (x1, y1) and (detected_x, detected_y)

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.convert_distance_to_meters
documentation: Convert distance from pixels to meters using the formula: d(meters) = d(pixels) × X

methods.name: object_position_calculator.calculate.CoordinateCalculator.calculate_bearing_from_center
documentation: Calculate the bearing from the center (x_center, y_center) to the point F (x_f, y_f)

documentation: Convert bearing from degrees to radians.

methods.name: object_position_calculator.CoordinateCalculator.CoordinateCalculator2.calculate_coordinate_change
documentation: Calculate coordinate change Δx and Δy.

methods.name: object_position_calculator.CoordinateCalculator.CoordinateCalculator2.calculate_new_coordinates
documentation: Calculate new coordinates.

methods.name: object_position_calculator.CoordinateCalculator.CoordinateCalculator2.pixels_to_meters
documentation: Convert pixel distance to meters.

documentation: Calculate horizontal distance from principle point.

documentation: Calculate Haversine distance between two latitude/longitude points.

documentation: Calculate Haversine distance between two latitude/longitude points.

documentation: Convert pixel distance to meters.

documentation: Calculate bearing offset of a point.

documentation: Calculate new latitude and longitude from a point using distance and bearing.

documentation: Assume objects were detected

documentation: San Francisco latitude

documentation: San Francisco longitude

methods.name: object_position_calculator.position_calculator.ObjectPositionCalculator.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the ObjectPositionCalculator with default constants.

```
param focal_length

The focal length of the camera in pixels.

param earth_radius

The radius of the Earth in kilometers.
```

methods.name: object_position_calculator.position_calculator.ObjectPositionCalculator.calculate_object_position
documentation:
Calculate the geographical position of an object.

```
param latitude

Latitude of the camera in degrees.

param longitude

Longitude of the camera in degrees.

param altitude

Altitude of the camera in kilometers.

param w

Width of the detected object in pixels.

param h

Height of the detected object in pixels (not used currently).

return

(latitude, longitude) of the object in degrees.
```

methods.name: object_position_calculator.position_calculator.ObjectPositionCalculator.get_object_position
documentation:
Wrapper to calculate object position only if detections exist.

```
param current_frame_detections

Boolean indicating whether objects are detected.

param latitude

Latitude of the camera in degrees.

param longitude

Longitude of the camera in degrees.

param altitude

Altitude of the camera in kilometers.

param x, y

Coordinates of the object in the frame (not used).

param w

Width of the detected object in pixels.

param h

Height of the detected object in pixels (not used currently).

return

(latitude, longitude) of the object or (None, None) if no detections.
```
